title: Ursula Brenner
compiled_truth: Ursula Brenner is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-12-13 to 2001-10-16), Ursula Brenner sent 14 and received 45 emails, totalling 59 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (11), [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (7), [Karen Denne](people/karen-denne) (3), [Rob Bradley](people/rob-bradley) (2), [Rpon](people/rpon-bellatlantic) (2).
